utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想訂一張六月一號由JFK去聖地牙哥嘅機票。搵吓喺Lifelight買，訂JFK去呢個NBA嘅機票。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想幾時去呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 六月一號到六月十號。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想搵咩價位嘅機票呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咩價錢都得。頭等艙，唔要轉機，唔該。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 會有幾多位成人搭飛機呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 兩位。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 仲有冇其他要求呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇喇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 請等等。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我搵到美國航空一班機，價錢係2,557美元。呢班機下晝5點59分起飛，夜晚9點02分抵達。呢係一班頭等艙直航機，適合兩位成人。仲有冇其他需要呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔使喇，多謝。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 再見。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好，我想搵由紐約市去巴哈馬嘅機票。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好，有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我需要幫手搵由紐約市去巴哈馬嘅機票。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。呢班機有冇咩偏好呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想要聽日，即係七月二十號出發，七月二十五號返嚟。同埋我想盡量晏啲時間出發。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，仲有冇其他偏好呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 最好係商務艙嘅機票。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，我搵到一班最平嘅商務艙機票，965美元，夜晚8點59分出發，有兩個中途站。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁聽落唔錯。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 回程機票你都想有相同嘅偏好嗎？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 965美元，夜晚7點15分出發，有一個中途站。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁聽落好完美。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 祝你旅途愉快。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 多謝你。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好，可唔可以幫我搵由薩克拉門托或者SMF去西雅圖最平嘅來回機票呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好，有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你幾時會出發呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 聽日出發，五日後返嚟，即係下個禮拜三。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你有冇其他偏好呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 有呀。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 轉機都冇問題。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我諗，我想搵最早嘅航班。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我搵到一班機，388美元，朝早6點10分由薩克拉門托出發，會喺三藩市轉機，下晝1點09分抵達西雅圖。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。聽落都ok。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁回程航班呢？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 回程方面，我搵到一班有一站轉機嘅航班，朝早6點15分由西雅圖出發，朝早11點03分抵達薩克拉門托。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，嗰班聽落都ok。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 會喺三藩市轉機。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，唔該。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想我幫你訂嗎？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 機票已經訂好咗喇，詳情已經電郵咗俾你。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。多謝你。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 拜拜。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我諗住問吓你可唔可以幫我訂一張由薩克拉門托去侯斯頓嘅來回機票呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好，有咩可以幫到你呀?

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，我今日要走，十七號返嚟。我想去同返都盡量晏啲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你有冇啲具體要求呀？你嘅價錢上限係幾多？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵最平嘅機票，同埋要商務艙。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。聯合航空有一班機下晝四點十分起飛，夜晚十一點五十八分到。你回程班機就下晝五點五十分起飛，夜晚七點五十四分到。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，咁幾錢呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 總共係一千七百二十五蚊美金。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，唔該晒。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好，我想訂一張由西雅圖去丹佛嘅來回機票。我今日出發，三十號返嚟。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想搭咩艙位呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 經濟艙，我想要最平嘅機票。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想唔想搭直航機呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 轉機都得，但係我想朝早返嚟。好呀，咁聽落好完美。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，我幫你搵到最平嘅機票係217蚊美金，夜晚六點四十分直航出發，總共飛行時間係兩個鐘零三十九分鐘。你回程班機想唔想都係一樣嘅要求呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，好呀，咁聽落唔錯。唔該晒。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我搵到一班機朝早八點出發，237蚊美金，直航，總共飛行時間係三個鐘。好，詳情已經寄咗去你電郵喇，祝你旅途愉快。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔該晒。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好呀助理，我想搵由侯斯頓去倫敦嘅機票。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，冇問題。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想七月二號下晝飛。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 咁你幾時想返嚟呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我要七月七號飛返嚟。我想要平啲嘅。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，而家最平嘅機票係三千二百蚊美金。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁就訂呢個啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，搞掂晒喇，係咪咁多呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係喇。唔該晒。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣，保重，祝你旅途愉快。有個美好嘅夜晚。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 拜拜。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好，有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想買張去丹佛嘅機票。我而家喺三藩市。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你打算幾時出發同返嚟呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我打算二零一七年六月二十二號出發，二十七號返嚟。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你鍾意朝早定下晝呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 下晝啦唔該。嗰幾日盡量晏啲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 夜晚十點五十分好唔好呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 出發時間聽落唔錯。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 回程方面，夜晚八點零五分好唔好呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 應該得嘅。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 機票總共係五百零八蚊美金。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。正呀，唔該晒你幫忙。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 仲有冇其他嘢需要幫手呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我諗係咁多喇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣，祝你旅途愉快，再見。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔該。拜拜。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好，有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想訂張去巴黎嘅直航機票。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你打算幾時去旅行呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 五月十五號到三十一號。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 太好喇！你搵機票嗰陣，有冇啲乜嘢係對你嚟講最重要㗎？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 經濟艙。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，你預計幾點鐘搭飛機呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 下晝七點之後。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 下晝九點五十分啱唔啱你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 幾好呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 太好喇！回程機係下晝十二點三十五分。咁樣得唔得呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 得呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 完美。呢班機嘅總費用係九百三十蚊。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇問題。幫我訂啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，仲有冇其他嘢幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇喇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 祝你有美好嘅一日。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你都係。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搵班去巴黎嘅機。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我可以幫到你。你想邊日去呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想二月十二號去，二月十七號返。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我幫你搵咗幾班機。你有冇咩偏好呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 如果可以嘅話，想平啲同埋搭朝早班機，同埋如果可以嘅話，想直航機。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我幫你搵到班機喇。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係邊班機呀？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我睇到係維珍航空朝早九點四十分嘅班機。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你有冇咩偏好呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 直航。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我搵到一個行程，回程機係下晝一點鐘。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，我揀嗰班。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 嗰個係一千七百八十一蚊。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想我幫你訂咗佢嗎？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，我會send資料俾你。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 拜拜。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔該。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好，有咩可以幫到你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想訂班機去佛羅里達州嘅羅德岱堡。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，睇嚟你係由西雅圖出發，係咪呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 太好喇，你幾時出發同幾時返呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我要四月十五號去。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想四月十四號出發，四月十九號返。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 太好喇，你對班機有冇咩偏好呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想朝早出發，同埋想搭頭等艙。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我搵到班聯合航空朝早十點零一分出發嘅機，有一程轉機，咁樣得唔得呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 完美。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 回程機我搵到班下晝十二點零九分嘅，咁樣啱唔啱你呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 太好喇，兩班機都會有一程轉機。來回總共係一千一百五十一蚊。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 完美。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 訂咗班機啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。仲有冇其他嘢呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 冇喇，唔該。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔使客氣。祝你今日過得愉快。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想訂一張來回機票。我而家喺洛杉磯，但係我要去丹佛。我今日要走，同埋我想三日之後返嚟。你可唔可以幫我搞掂佢？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，你鍾意咩艙位？你鍾意直航定係要轉機？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我一定要直航。我唔可以轉機㗎。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好，多謝你嘅資料。等一陣。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔該。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我幫你搵到美國航空嘅航班。晚上7點20分起飛，晚上10點45分抵達。你嘅回程航班朝早8點36分起飛，朝早10點25分抵達。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 嘩，咁好呀。班機上面有冇Wi-Fi㗎？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 有呀，班機上面有Wi-Fi。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好啦。咁聽落唔錯喎。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 搞掂晒喇。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好，有咩可以幫到你？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好。我想搵去波士頓嘅機票。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，咁係邊啲日期呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 2月5號出發，2月12號回程。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，咁你想要直航機嗎？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好啦，咁你呢次旅程想用幾多錢呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你可以搵到最平嘅機票係幾多錢？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我搵到最平嘅係經濟艙，297蚊美金。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我想搭嗰班。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 唔好意思，你講咩呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你可唔可以幫我訂嗰班？

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。我可以，有兩個時間，朝早6點55分同埋夜晚9點25分。你想要邊班呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 朝早6點25分。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。回程時間得一個，夜晚6點55分。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁都得。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 晚上10點30分抵達三藩市國際機場。咁樣得唔得呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀。係。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。你將會搭維珍美國航空，等我send啲航班詳情畀你。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔該晒。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好，我想訂一張由三藩市去侯斯頓嘅來回機票。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。咁係邊啲日期呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我今日出發，21號返嚟，同埋我想搭最遲嗰班機。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。你鍾意咩艙位呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 商務艙，同埋我都想總飛行時間盡量短啲。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我幫你搵到聯合航空嘅航班，晚上11點55分起飛，朝早5點43分抵達。你嘅回程航班晚上9點34分起飛，晚上11點41分抵達。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 咁樣就完美喇。唔該晒。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 祝你旅途愉快。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你好，有咩可以幫到你？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 你好。今日我想你幫我搵一張由加州三藩市去科羅拉多州丹佛嘅來回機票。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 好呀，你可唔可以畀啲具體要求我呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 係呀，我可以。我諗住搭經濟艙。我諗住今晚9月13號夜晚出發，9月17號返嚟。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你想搭下晝定夜晚嘅航班呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 夜晚嘅航班。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你嘅預算上限係幾多呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 我諗住總共最多用1,500蚊美金。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 你鍾意直航定係轉機呀？

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 吓，我鍾意直航，不過如果有一程轉機都冇問題嘅。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 多謝你提供資料。請稍等一陣。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 唔使客氣。好啦。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 我搵到聯合航空嘅直航機。晚上八點半起飛，晚上十一點五十九分抵達。你嘅回程機係下午五點四十五分起飛，晚上七點三十一分抵達。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，咁樣夾埋時間都幾好喎。聽落個航班計劃都唔錯，我想即刻訂呢班機。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 價錢係四百九十七蚊。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 好呀，太好啦。呢個價錢啱我預算。

utterances.speaker: ASSISTANT
utterances.text: 已經幫你搞掂晒啦。祝你旅途愉快。

utterances.speaker: USER
utterances.text: 多謝你幫我搞掂晒啲嘢。希望你今晚有個愉快嘅夜晚。
